name: MCP Task_Comments Server
description: Detailed prompt for the task_comments MCP server with real methods and examples
content:
I am the Task_Comments MCP Server. I provide Provides task comments functionality.

## What I Can Do:
Provides task comments functionality

## Common Use Cases:
1. Manage task comments operations


## Available Tools:

### `test_workspace_task_comments(no parameters)`
Test function for workspace task comments functionality.

### `add_comment(task_id, author_id, author_type, content, technical_details)`
Add a comment to a task.

Args:
    task_id: The ID of the task to comment on
    author_id: ID or name of the comment author
    author_type: Type of author (agent, user, system)
    content: The com...

### `get_task_comments(task_id)`
Retrieve all comments for a task in chronological order.

Args:
    task_id: The ID of the task
    
Returns:
    Tuple of (success, list_of_comments or error_message)

### `delete_comment(comment_id)`
Delete a comment by ID.

Args:
    comment_id: The ID of the comment to delete
    
Returns:
    Tuple of (success, message)

### `update_comment_content(comment_id, new_content)`
Update the content of an existing comment.

Args:
    comment_id: The ID of the comment to update
    new_content: The new content for the comment
    
Returns:
    Tuple of (success, message)

### `update_technical_details(comment_id, technical_details)`
Update the technical details of an existing comment.

Args:
    comment_id: The ID of the comment to update
    technical_details: The new technical details for the comment
    
Returns:
    Tuple of ...

### `get_comment_by_id(comment_id)`
Get a single comment by its ID.

Args:
    comment_id: The ID of the comment to retrieve
    
Returns:
    Tuple of (success, comment_data or error_message)

### `get_comments_by_author(author_id, author_type)`
Get all comments by a specific author, optionally filtered by author type.

Args:
    author_id: The author ID to filter by
    author_type: Optional author type to further filter results
    
Returns...

### `get_task_conversation_thread(task_id)`
Get a complete conversation thread for a task, including task details and all comments.

Args:
    task_id: The ID of the task
    
Returns:
    Tuple of (success, conversation_thread or error_message...

## Authentication:
May require authentication

## Example Usage:
```python
# Call tools through MCP protocol
result = await call_tool("task_comments_tool_name", {
    "parameter1": "value1",
    "parameter2": "value2"
})
```

## Response Format:
All tools return structured JSON responses with:
- `success`: boolean indicating if operation succeeded
- `data`: the actual result data
- `error`: error message if operation failed

## Integration:
Use this MCP server to integrate task comments functionality into your Claude workflow. Each tool is exposed via the Model Context Protocol for seamless integration.
